seo_title: 7 Ways to Travel Smarter This Summer with Google Search
meta_description: Discover how Google's latest tools can help you plan trips, find deals, and explore destinations like a pro.
body_html:
With Google Search, you can find the best deals on flights and hotels, plan your trip with personalized recommendations, and explore your destination like a local.

Get turn-by-turn directions to your destination Explore streets, landmarks, and points of interest Find the best places to eat and drink near you

2. Book Flights and Hotels with Google Express

Get exclusive deals on flights and hotels Book with just one click Track your booking status in real-time

3. Find the Best Travel Deals with Google Flights

Google Flights Features FeatureDescription Price AlertsGet notified when prices drop on your desired flight Flight ComparisonCompare prices across airlines and find the best deals Flight SchedulesView flight schedules and plan your trip accordingly

4. Explore Your Destination with Google Arts & Culture Discover art, history, and culture from around the world with Google Arts & Culture. This platform offers a wealth of information on museums, galleries, and cultural institutions from around the globe.

5. Stay Safe While Traveling with Google

Get travel alerts and safety tips Find your nearest embassy or consulate Track your flight status in real-time

source.title: 7 ways to travel smarter this summer, with help from Google
source.summary: Illustration showing a person with a Pixel phone in a beach town farmers' market by the water
